sections.name: Hook — The Universal Reframe
sections.content_preview:
Whether your child is 3 or 10, verbal or non-verbal, diagnosed or wondering, if they don't feel when they need to go, every method that assumes they do will fail.

sections.name: Failed Methods Recognition
sections.content_preview: Sitting on the potty for 20 minutes and having nothing happen. The reward chart with a full row of stickers, and still no progress. "He knows he has to go, he just won't." I hear versions of this stor

sections.name: Mechanism Deep
sections.content_preview: There's a word for this: **interoception** — the internal sense of what's happening inside your body. For children with sensory differences, the signal from bladder to brain can be delayed or absent.

- **Secondary link text:** No rush, read when you're ready
